name: bug
description: Broken behavior in template defaults or tooling

name: enhancement
description: Improvement request for the template or workflow

name: template
description: Module scaffold, build-logic, or template evolution work

name: documentation
description: Docs-only changes or gaps in guidance

name: good first issue
description: Good entry point for first-time contributors

name: priority/high
description: Important and should be planned soon

name: build-logic
description: Convention plugins and shared Gradle logic

name: breaking-change
description: Marks changes that require migration notes in release notes

name: skip-changelog
description: Exclude this pull request from generated changelog and release notes
